ascend_skill.desc:
On each ally's action, gain 1 Musical Note stack, up to a maximum of 12 stacks.
Before any ally's action, Manaka can activate Da Capo (the initial use count in each battle is 1). After activating Da Capo, when Wonder takes 7 actions other than additional actions, restore the use count by 1 (this effect activates only 1 time per battle).
Da Capo: Remove 1 debuff effect from 1 ally. At the end of the target's next action, grant a special additional action. When in this state, the target's HP, SP, buff/debuff effects, and skill cooldowns are reset to their state at the start of the previous action.
ascend_skill.name: Andante

ascend_skill.desc:
At the start of battle, gain the maximum number of Musical Note stacks, and reduce the first cooldown time by 4 actions.
Also, when using Melody of Steps, also increase party's critical rate by 12% for 2 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Allegro

ascend_skill.desc:
Increase final damage amplification of allies with extra actions from Da Capo by 12%.
When an ally is KO'd, restore their HP equal to 20% of Manaka's Attack + 2000. This effect can be activated once per battle.
ascend_skill.name: Fortissimo

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Prayer Refrain and Melody of Steps by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Vibrato

ascend_skill.desc: At the start of battle, or when an ally activates a Highlight or Theurgy, gain 2 Musical Note stacks. Stacks gained from this effect can exceed the maximum limit up to 2 times.
ascend_skill.name: Symphonia

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill level of Winged Canon by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Molto Vivace

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the initial use count of Da Capo by 1.
ascend_skill.name: Con Anima

normal_skill.desc:
Increase party's damage by 7.0%/7.7%/7.8%/8.5% for 2 turns (for every 164 points of Manaka's Attack, increase by 1% more, up to a maximum of 28.0%/30.8%/31.4%/34.2%).
Also, gain 4 Musical Note stacks.
Cooldown Time: 4 ally actions
normal_skill.name: Winged Canon

normal_skill.desc:
Restore HP to party equal to 10.0%/10.0%/11.2%/11.2% of Manaka's Attack + 681/816/989/1124, and remove 1 debuff.
When Manaka has Musical Note, spend 1 Musical Note stack, and reduce skill cooldown by 1 action. (this effect can reduce cooldowns by up to 4 actions).
If this skill is selected and used, increase healing by 50%.
Cooldown Time: 8 ally actions
Automatic Effect: For every 12 Musical Note stacks gained during battle, activate this skill's healing effect 1 time.
normal_skill.name: Prayer Refrain

normal_skill.desc:
Increase party's Attack by 11% of Manaka's Attack + 128/140/143/156 for 2 turns.
Spend all Musical Note stacks, and for each stack spent, increase party's pierce rate by 0.1% for every 460 points of Manaka's Attack, and increase party's Attack by 0.1% for every 460 points of Manaka's Attack. Lasts for 2 turns.
This skill applies up to 4600/5060/5980/6440 of Manaka's Attack.
Cooldown Time: 4 ally actions
normal_skill.name: Melody of Steps

passive_skill.desc: Increase Attack of allies with Da Capo by 37.5%.
passive_skill.name: Crescendo

passive_skill.desc: Based on the total number of Musical Note stacks gained, increase party's pierce rate by 1.0% for each stack. Counts up to 12 stacks.
passive_skill.name: Heavenly Voice
